rawAssistant: Charm hoops are a matter of personal flair and local superstition, I suppose. Some folks swear by them, while others treat 'em as nothing more than pretty trinkets. Still, it can't hurt to have one on your person, especially when you're venturing into the Wilderward. Just don't expect 'em to ward off every storm or misfortune – that's where a sturdy coat and quick thinking come in.
